festivals.name: Egg Festival
highlights: Egg Hunt minigame (collect 9 eggs to win)
Pierre sells Strawberry Seeds for 100g each — BUY AS MANY AS POSSIBLE
festivals.year1Notes: Strawberry Seeds are the best Spring crop. Buy 20+ if possible.

festivals.name: Flower Dance
highlights: Dance with a bachelor/bachelorette (requires 4+ hearts)
Pierre and Sandy sell seeds and furniture
festivals.year1Notes: Good for NPC relationship building. No critical items.

festivals.name: Luau
highlights: Add an item to the communal potluck soup
Governor rates the soup — Gold/Iridium quality item = +friendship with all NPCs
festivals.year1Notes: Bring a Gold or Iridium quality crop to boost all NPC friendships at once.

festivals.name: Dance of the Moonlight Jellies
highlights: Passive event — watch jellyfish parade
All NPCs present — good for talking to multiple people
festivals.year1Notes: No economic impact. Use for NPC conversations.

festivals.name: Stardew Valley Fair
highlights: Grange Display: exhibit 9 items to earn Star Tokens
Minigames: fishing, spinning wheel, smashing
Star Token shop with rare items
festivals.year1Notes: Buy the Stardrop (2000 tokens) — it permanently increases max energy. Win tokens by displaying high-quality items in the Grange.

festivals.name: Spirit's Eve
highlights: Haunted maze — navigate to the center for a reward
Golden Pumpkin in the center of the maze
Pierre sells some items
festivals.year1Notes: Complete the maze to get the Golden Pumpkin (2500g sell price, or gift to NPCs).

festivals.name: Festival of Ice
highlights: Ice fishing contest
All NPCs present — efficient for conversations
festivals.year1Notes: Talk to all NPCs in one place. No critical items.

festivals.name: Night Market
highlights: 3-night event (days 15, 16, 17)
Rare items for sale including Ancient Seeds
Magic Shop Boat: fish rare species unavailable elsewhere
Mermaid Show, Skeleton Ship, rotating vendors
festivals.year1Notes: Buy Ancient Seeds if available — plant in Greenhouse for year-round profit. Fish from the Magic Boat for rare catches.

festivals.name: Feast of the Winter Star
highlights: Secret Santa gift exchange — you give and receive
Your gift recipient is randomized
Bring a high-quality item (Gold+ crop or artisan good)
festivals.year1Notes: Give a Gold quality item to whoever you're assigned. You receive a gift in return — usually something valuable.
